vo.text: OpenClaw is the new corporate policy that promises seamless automation across sales, support, and security.

visual.headline: OpenClaw is here.
visual.subtitle: It is mostly flowcharts and mandatory meetings.

vo.text: The kickoff meeting is at 10 a.m. on a Wednesday, which is definitely when people are most excited about another status update.

lower_third.headline: Mandatory kickoff
lower_third.subtitle: Another calendar invite for the AI policy rollout.

scenes.notes: Calendar mockup for the OpenClaw kickoff meeting.

vo.text: Dilbert is not convinced that turning the office printer into a sentient compliance officer is the right approach.

visual.headline: The all-knowing office printer
visual.subtitle: Still waiting for the approval flowchart.
